report_text: Worldwide Governance Indicators were retained as contextual institutional information and optional sensitivity material. They were not included among the five final POSet ordering variables.

The six WGI dimensions are official World Bank governance indicators. Any combined governance score used in this project is a derived contextual composite and should not be described as an official WGI index.

topic: Reason for exclusion from final ordering
report_text: Governance was excluded from the final POSet ordering to keep the main structural framework focused on five economic and socio-structural capacity variables and to avoid mixing institutional context directly into the final ordering rule.
